query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A straight-on nighttime view of a multi-story yellow brick wall with two rectangular windows near the top, casting long diagonal shadows across the brick surface. A horizontal dark band divides the wall across the middle. The foreground is covered in white snow with subtle undulations and ridges. A tall black utility pole stands near the right edge of the frame, rising from the snow with a small orange object visible at its base.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A straight-on nighttime view of a multi-story brick wall and snow-covered ground illuminated by a sickly yellow sodium vapor light that shifts surfaces toward an unhealthy, unsettling hue. Two rectangular windows near the top cast long diagonal shadows across the wall, which is bisected by a horizontal dark band. The foreground shows white snow with subtle undulations, and a tall black utility pole stands near the right edge with a small orange object at its base.
